授業目的: In this course students will study the interconnectedness of global environmental issues and sustainable development.
到達目標: Students completing this course will be able to:-Acquire basic knowledge on global environmental issues and the policies of addressing sustainable use of natural resources-Understand how environmental policies aim to balance ecological, economic, and social factors, with a focus on sustainability -Expand knowledges of how science interconnects with environmental policy analysis and decision making-Enhance critical thinking, reading, discussing, presenting, and writing skills
特記事項: 【合併】Global Environmental Policy（総合政策学部）/地球環境政策（総合政策学部）/Global Environmental Policy　（総合政策研究科修士）
関連科目: Ecological Policy, 自然環境論, 生態学特論

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading3: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
成績評価Grading5: 備考　Note -This course is discussion-based. A minimum TOEFL score of 470, or an equivalent qualification (e.g., TOEIC 600), is recommended to ensure active participation.-Students are expected to actively participate in class discussion. Participation means activity: just being present is not participating! Your contribution to class discussion will be graded accordingly.- It is highly recommended to take this class after completing 自然環境論（29222000）．-There will be a midterm exam during the semester & a final cumulative exam.-Exams will cover materials from class and assigned readings.-Make-up exams may be considered with an appropriate University accepted excuse. The student must contact the instructor within 24 hours of examination to discuss possible arrangements. Students who have a valid reason for missing an exam may pre-arrange (at least 2 weeks prior to the exam) a date for taking the make-up exam. If a student misses an exam without making arrangements prior to the exam date, or misses the arranged make-up exam, the student will obtain a zero for the exam. Additionally, I will not accept make-up exam requests made 24 hours past the exam.-Students are expected to attend all lectures, and to perform all the assigned work.-Late assignments will not be accepted. -Academic dishonesty in any form is not tolerated.

name: 【300】Global Environmental Policy／Global Environmental Policy
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
-This course is discussion-based. A minimum TOEFL score of 470, or an equivalent qualification (e.g., TOEIC 600), is recommended to ensure active participation.
-Students are expected to actively participate in class discussion. Participation means activity: just being present is not participating! Your contribution to class discussion will be graded accordingly.
- It is highly recommended to take this class after completing 自然環境論（29222000）．
-There will be a midterm exam during the semester & a final cumulative exam.
-Exams will cover materials from class and assigned readings.
-Make-up exams may be considered with an appropriate University accepted excuse. The student must contact the instructor within 24 hours of examination to discuss possible arrangements. Students who have a valid reason for missing an exam may pre-arrange (at least 2 weeks prior to the exam) a date for taking the make-up exam. If a student misses an exam without making arrangements prior to the exam date, or misses the arranged make-up exam, the student will obtain a zero for the exam. Additionally, I will not accept make-up exam requests made 24 hours past the exam.
-Students are expected to attend all lectures, and to perform all the assigned work.
-Late assignments will not be accepted. 
-Academic dishonesty in any form is not tolerated.
